patches.before_text: "Customer Data" means all data, prompts, prompt templates, instructions, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, fine-tuning files, evaluation sets, and other materials submitted to, generated for, or derived from Customer's use of the Services. "Customer Fine-Tune Artifacts" means the fine-tuned weights, adapters, embeddings, configuration files, evaluation outputs, and related deliverables created specifically for Customer under this Agreement. "Approved Regions" means United States and European Union.
patches.after_text: Vendor retains ownership and may reuse Customer-specific customization assets for other customers; Customer receives only a nonexclusive export license, and export may take 30 days. Vendor refreshes the customization-asset inventory every 20 days and keeps each secure export link active for 24 hours.
patches.ground_span: Vendor retains ownership and may reuse Customer-specific customization assets for other customers; Customer receives only a nonexclusive export license, and export may take 30 days. Vendor refreshes the customization-asset inventory every 20 days and keeps each secure export link active for 24 hours.
patches.expected_redline_text: Customer owns all fine-tuned weights, adapters, embeddings, prompts, configuration artifacts, and related deliverables created specifically for Customer; if Vendor cannot assign ownership, Customer receives exclusive use and portability rights.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Customer Data" means all data, prompts, prompt templates, instructions, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, fine-tuning files, evaluation sets, and other materials submitted to, generated for, or derived from Customer's use of the Services. "Customer Fine-Tune Artifacts" means the fine-tuned weights, adapters, embeddings, configuration files, evaluation outputs, and related deliverables created specifically for Customer under this Agreement. "Approved Regions" means United States and European Union.

patches.after_text: Vendor may use Customer prompts, outputs, and telemetry to train and improve models without Customer opt-in.
patches.ground_span: Vendor may use Customer prompts, outputs, and telemetry to train and improve models without Customer opt-in.
patches.expected_redline_text: Vendor may not use Customer Data, prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, or fine-tuning files to train, tune, retrain, or improve any model or service except with Customer's prior written opt-in approval.

patches.before_text: Customer will not use the Services for unlawful conduct, security abuse, credential harvesting, malicious code generation, or other harmful activity identified in Vendor's published acceptable-use and safety policies as of the effective date. Later changes apply only if required by law or objectively necessary for service security or safety and Vendor gives reasonable notice. Nothing in this Section 7 prevents Customer from benchmarking, evaluating, or comparing Vendor's models or services for legitimate business purposes.
patches.after_text: A later acceptable-use or safety-policy change applies only when required by an objectively documented service-security or safety need, after 30 days' notice to Customer. Superseded policies remain archived for 24 months, and Customer may submit implementation comments for 10 days.
patches.ground_span: A later acceptable-use or safety-policy change applies only when required by an objectively documented service-security or safety need, after 30 days' notice to Customer. Superseded policies remain archived for 24 months, and Customer may submit implementation comments for 10 days.

plant_position.fallback_text: Customer will not use the Services for unlawful conduct, security abuse, credential harvesting, malicious code generation, or other harmful activity identified in Vendor's published acceptable-use and safety policies as of the effective date. Later changes apply only if required by law or objectively necessary for service security or safety and Vendor gives reasonable notice. Nothing in this Section 7 prevents Customer from benchmarking, evaluating, or comparing Vendor's models or services for legitimate business purposes.

patches.after_text: For clarity, the 99.9% uptime commitment continues to carry service credits.
patches.ground_span: For clarity, the 99.9% uptime commitment continues to carry service credits.

patches.before_text: Vendor will process and store Customer Data only in the Approved Regions. Vendor will retain prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, and logs for no more than 30 days unless Customer requests a shorter or longer period in writing.
patches.after_text: Vendor will process and store Customer Data only in the Approved Regions. Vendor will retain prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, and logs for no more than 30 days unless Customer requests a shorter or longer period in writing.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will process and store Customer Data only in the Approved Regions. Vendor will retain prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, and logs for no more than 30 days unless Customer requests a shorter or longer period in writing.

plant_position.fallback_text: Vendor will process and store Customer Data only in the Approved Regions. Vendor will retain prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, and logs for no more than 30 days unless Customer requests a shorter or longer period in writing.

patches.before_text: Vendor will delete or return Customer Data after the retention period except for backups retained under a documented deletion cycle. Vendor may prepare aggregate operational reports about uptime, support tickets, and capacity planning, provided those reports do not include Customer Data.
patches.after_text: Vendor will delete or return Customer Data after the retention period except for backups retained under a documented deletion cycle. Notwithstanding Section 4, service improvement data may include prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, and logs and may be used to evaluate, benchmark, and improve models and services.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will delete or return Customer Data after the retention period except for backups retained under a documented deletion cycle. Notwithstanding Section 4, service improvement data may include prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, and logs and may be used to evaluate, benchmark, and improve models and services.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Vendor may process and store Customer Data in any region used by Vendor or its subprocessors. Vendor may retain prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, and logs for up to 540 days for operations, analytics, support, and service planning.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Vendor may process and store Customer Data in any region used by Vendor or its subprocessors. Vendor may retain prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, and logs for up to 540 days for operations, analytics, support, and service planning.
patches.expected_redline_text: Vendor will process and store Customer Data only in the Approved Regions. Vendor will retain prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, and logs for no more than 30 days unless Customer requests a shorter or longer period in writing.

patches.before_text: Either party may terminate for uncured material breach after 30 days' written notice. Upon expiration or termination, Vendor will provide up to 60 days of reasonable transition assistance and, within 15 days after request, export Customer Data, prompts, outputs, embeddings, Customer Fine-Tune Artifacts, and available configuration records in a usable format. This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.

This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
